title: leucanthemum coronopifolium subsp. coronopifolium
intro: Leucanthemum coronopifolium subsp. coronopifolium, also known as the Buttonweed or Western Daisy, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Leucanthemum coronopifolium subsp. coronopifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
